title: Selenipedium × macrochilum giganteum

This genus is part of the subfamily Cypripedioideae, commonly known as the Venus slipper orchids. The family Orchidaceae is one of the largest and most diverse families in the plant kingdom, with over 30,000 known species. intro: Selenipedium × macrochilum giganteum, also known as the giant bird's nest orchid, is a unique and rare species of flowering orchid that belongs to the Selenipedium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which may help alleviate congestion and promote a healthy mucus flow.
